name: BadgrCI
description: Always-on Azure Pipelines check that diagnoses failed builds, reports pipeline health, scans for security risks, and suggests fixes. Runs locally by default. No API key required.
helpMarkDown: Add as the last step with condition: always(). Set BADGR_API_KEY for AI-powered diagnosis of unknown failures. Set SYSTEM_ACCESSTOKEN for richer logs and PR thread comments.

inputs.name: ci_token
inputs.label: CI Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure platform token for richer log access and PR comments. Badgr also auto-detects System.AccessToken when Azure exposes it — this input is optional.
